title: [AR] Advancements: Recolored
description: This pack changes the advancement frame color depending wether obtained = true/false. From yellow and gray, it's green and red. Also comes with a yellow border, and background changes for the "Minecraft", "Adventure", and "End" tabs!
body:
**This pack makes some color tweaks for the advancements window.**

# ✨ Changes:
- Unobtained advancement's frame changes from gray to red.
- Obtained advancement's frame changes from yellow-orange to green.
- Unobtained advancement's box bar changes from blue to red.
- Obtained advancement's box bar changes from yellow to green
- Advancements window's border color changes from white to yellow.
- End tab's background changes from endstone to endstone bricks.
- Minecraft tab's background changes from stone to bookshelves.
- Adventure tab's background changes from sandstone to sand.

<details>
<summary>📸 Preview</summary>

![Obtanied Advancement](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c448d1e0835c65bdda5931901e6c77e380e7e588.png)

![Unobtained Advancement](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2da5221b8823e3ecb55c959da4beed8e4e0ab27.png)

![Adventure Tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e1844fa5d8eddfcf9bc926db4ea60f01ce39b8f.png)

![Minecraft Tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b140e07d2f159118081ca9801c7c19d4014946f.png)

![End Tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99063d42e89020a263954181e9bb1d20e8a6f3e0.png)

</details>

# 🔩 Supports:
- 1.21.9+
- Some parts would NOT work if another pack that changes something from the list above is ABOVE this pack on the pack list.

# 🎈 More Info:

<details>
<summary>🧰 Updates</summary>
We will update the pack a week or two after a new Minecraft version comes out.
</details>

<details>
<summary>⚙ Installation</summary>
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/hZZ3U417VOI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</details>

<details>
<summary>🎨 Altering, Customizing, and Uploading the Pack</summary>
You can change assets inside the pack, but you cannot upload it anywhere (Modrinth, Curseforge, Social Media, etc.). Use it for yourself and the people you know. If you want to create addons/extensions for my packs, please delete all the assets I made, then upload your own anywhere you'd like.
</details>
